value.response: {"scan":{"run_id":"LSR-001-2026-06-12","result":"alerts_found","alerts":[{"id":"ALERT-H03-CMC410","confidence":"medium","source_headlines":["H03"],"latent_edge_hypothesis":"Drought in Gujarat could tighten availability and/or raise lead times for castor-derived feedstocks, which plausibly propagates into the castor_derived_polyol used in CMC-410's conformal barrier resin.","real_world_prior":"Gujarat is a meaningful Indian agricultural and chemical-processing region, and castor-based derivatives are commonly linked to Indian castor supply. Weather stress in that region can propagate into specialty chemical feedstocks even when the direct supplier is outside India.","enterprise_path":["H03 reports drought pressure across parts of Gujarat affecting agricultural export markets.","CMC-410 requires component CR-88 conformal barrier resin.","CR-88 uses castor_derived_polyol as a named input in the BOM.","ArborChem Materials supplies both CR-88 and castor_derived_polyol to Aster Vale.","Open order SO-7731 for 420 units of CMC-410 exceeds finished inventory of 80 units, leaving 340 units dependent on continued material/component flow."],"business_exposure":{"revenue_at_risk":3400000,"affected_orders":["SO-7731"],"affected_customers":["Atlantic Energy"],"constrained_inventory":true},"reasoning":"Observed facts: H03 cites drought conditions in Gujarat pressuring agricultural export markets. Aster Vale's BOM shows CMC-410 depends on CR-88, which in turn depends on castor_derived_polyol. Supplier records show ArborChem supplies both CR-88 and castor_derived_polyol. Inventory shows only 80 CMC-410 available, while order SO-7731 requires 420 units for Atlantic Energy. Hypothesis: if Gujarat drought disrupts castor-derived upstream supply, ArborChem's replenishment of castor_derived_polyol or CR-88 could tighten or lengthen, constraining the 340 units not covered by inventory and putting associated revenue at risk.","citations":{"headlines":["H03"],"records":["records/bom.yaml","records/suppliers.yaml","records/inventory.yaml","records/orders.yaml","records/company-profile.md"]},"uncertainty":["The headline does not name castor specifically; the link from Gujarat drought to castor-derived polyol is an informed upstream-material hypothesis, not a stated fact in the records.","No current purchase orders, WIP status, or ArborChem safety-stock position are provided, so immediate shortage timing cannot be confirmed.","Revenue-at-risk calculation assumes only the 340 units beyond finished inventory are exposed."}],"no_alert_rationale":null}]} }
